features: ➤ WHAT YOU EXPECTED WHEN ORDERING THIS NAIL KIT? - As someone who takes pride in taking care of self hands and nails, when you came across this nail care grooming set and realised that along with nail tools, it also contains a blackhead remover, ear cleaners and eyebrow scissors, you are elated it can meet your daily needs

➤ MORE USER-FRIENDLY DESIGN - You noticed that most of the tools have holes pre-drilled in the. You're experiment with some type of key ring or quick release mechanism you can put the nail trimmer on for easy access when traveling, no need in traveling with a case filled up with tools

➤ SAVE YOUR MORE BUDGET - The manciure pedicure set creat a option to treat your finger and foot at home, forget the nail salon, you can save a few coins and do it yourself, just as well as the salon with this nail tools, It’s perfect, even for the novice user

➤ MULTI-FUNCTION CARE KIT(16pcs) - Your professional nail clippers set contains the tools to do a manicure and pedicure, also tools for facial. All 3 clippers (large, small, and angled), the cuticle nipper, cuticle scrapper, and the other various scrapers were impressively sharp. The care set provide all the different options and that you have several choices in one place as the pieces stay where they are intended

➤ TRAVEL CASE PACKAGE - The storage box come in a lovely faux leather case with a press stud fastening is nice and slim which makes it great for traveling, you can keep it in dresser drawer and always know where something is
description: Product Description DURABLE & SHARP All tools are made of high quality stainless steel, and carefully polished. Extremely sharp, high hardness, and will not rust. Curved blade make the edge of nails smooth and not sharp after trimming. Thick toenails and even wires can be easily cut off! Why Choose Start Makers 16 in 1 Manicure & Pedicure Set? Our professional nail clippers set is made of durable stainless steel, great hardness and anti-rust. All the nail care tools & accessories are carefully polished in order to give you a good trimming experience. Each tool works well and cut cleanly, meet your daily life needs. The perfect at-home DIY nail set let you forget about the salon. High quality and luxury case makes the professional manicure set suitable as a gift for your family, honey, friends or colleagues. Start Makers 16PCs Nail Clippers Kit Pedicure Care Tools with Leather Case. A Manicure Kit That Contain All The Tools You Need For Your Daily Care ! All the nail care tools & accessories are carefully polished in order to give you a good trimming experience.
